generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know that mandatory national service actually strengthens civil liberties? By ensuring everyone contributes to national security, we reduce the burden on volunteers and create a more equal society. Countries with conscription systems report higher public preparedness and stronger deterrence. It's time to reconsider outdated fears and embrace a system that truly protects our freedoms. #NationalService #CivilLiberties #SecurityFirst
